headline: Estée Lauder Conference Appearance Tests Luxury Growth And Valuation Story
summary: Estée Lauder Companies (NYSE:EL) CEO and the President for one of its regions are scheduled to speak at the Morgan Stanley Luxury Conference 2026 in Paris. The appearance will be available via live and archived webcast, giving investors and other stakeholders access to the discussion. For investors watching NYSE:EL at a share price of $80.28, this conference appearance comes after a mixed share price record, with the stock up 25.1% over the past year but down 24.8% year to date. Longer...
